full_text:
Xia Yu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xia Yuwas born in Xiapi. A trusted general of Duan Jiong, he later tried to prevent Xian from fleeing. Xia Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Guo Si.
